code: import axios from'axios';const API_BASE_URL=process.env.REACT_APP_API_URL||'http://localhost:8000';const api=axios.create({baseURL:API_BASE_URL,headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'}});api.interceptors.request.use(config=>{const token=localStorage.getItem('token');if(token){config.headers.Authorization="Bearer ".concat(token);}return config;});api.interceptors.response.use(response=>response,error=>{var _error$response;if(((_error$response=error.response)===null||_error$response===void 0?void 0:_error$response.status)===401){localStorage.removeItem('token');window.location.href='/login';}return Promise.reject(error);});export const authAPI={sendOtp:phone=>api.post('/api/auth/send-otp/',{phone}),verifyOtp:(phone,otp)=>api.post('/api/auth/verify-otp/',{phone,otp}),me:()=>api.get('/api/auth/me/')};export const productAPI={list:params=>api.get('/api/products/',{params}),detail:slug=>api.get("/api/products/".concat(slug,"/")),categories:()=>api.get('/api/categories/')};export const cartAPI={reserve:data=>api.post('/api/inventory/reserve/',data),sync:items=>api.post('/api/cart/sync/',{items})};export const orderAPI={create:data=>api.post('/api/orders/',data),list:()=>api.get('/api/orders/'),detail:id=>api.get("/api/orders/".concat(id,"/")),track:id=>api.get("/api/orders/".concat(id,"/track/"))};export const paymentAPI={createOrder:data=>api.post('/api/payments/create-order/',data),verify:data=>api.post('/api/payments/verify/',data)};export const adminAPI={dashboard:()=>api.get('/api/admin/dashboard/'),products:params=>api.get('/api/admin/products/',{params}),updateProduct:(id,data)=>api.patch("/api/admin/products/".concat(id,"/"),data),orders:params=>api.get('/api/admin/orders/',{params}),updateOrderStatus:(id,status)=>api.patch("/api/admin/orders/".concat(id,"/"),{status}),tickets:()=>api.get('/api/admin/tickets/')};export default api;
